title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
desc: A female boxing phenom enters a forbidden relationship with her trainer. But when she tries to leave his controlling grip, she finds herself fighting for her life.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
desc: A married man embarks on a forbidden relationship with his 14-year-old babysitter. When his wife finds out, he will stop at nothing to keep his affair secret from the police.

title: Charlie's Angels
desc: Charlie, a wealthy mystery figure, tasks three capable and captivating women with the job of finding Eric Knox, a genius in software development and the leader of Knox Enterprises.

title: Malignant
desc: Madison, a young woman, is terrified by visions of the murders of strangers. Later, she decides to find and save the victims.

title: The Equalizer 2
desc: Robert McCall's close friend, Susan Plummer, is killed while investigating a murder-suicide. As a former marine and spy, he leverages his skills and resources to find the culprit and avenge her death.

title: Goosebumps 2: Haunted Halloween
desc: Sonny and Sam find an ancient manuscript in an abandoned house while cleaning it. However, things escalate when the text brings a ventriloquist dummy named Slappy to life.

title: Collateral Damage
desc: Gordy, a firefighter, loses his family in a bombing and frustrated by inaction, embarks on a dangerous journey to track down those responsible, risking everything for justice.

title: The Island
desc: Lincoln Six-Echo, a resident of an isolated facility, desperately wants to go to The Island, the last safe haven on Earth. However, he soon discovers that everything he knows is a lie.

title: Food Factory
desc: Meet the saucy squad behind mountains of delicious cannelloni and find out what it takes to make rice noodles by the truckload.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in the harsh Australian outback by taking extreme measures to avoid sun stroke, finding food, and avoiding the deadly salt water crocodiles.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls demonstrates how to survive in Ecuador's jungles by building bamboo bridges, making a bow and arrow, and showing which plants are poisonous.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls demonstrates all the techniques and skills that are required in order to stay alive in the dangerous waters of the Everglades.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Bear Grylls travels across Kenya to demonstrate how to survive the African savannah.

title: Man vs. Wild
desc: Adventurer Bear Grylls survives the Pacific Ocean, encountering coral reefs, rip currents, and relentless surf and comes face to face with sharks.

title: Toddlers & Tiaras
desc: In Westminster, Arkansas contestants are excited to compete with their pets for the top title at the Me and My Pet Pageant.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
desc: It is love at first sight for Michelle and Dennis. But soon, the dark past of Michelle's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide.

title: Forbidden: Dying for Love
desc: A high-flying attorney and one of his clients embark on an illicit affair. When their secret is revealed, the laws of attraction prove fatal.

title: The Matrix Revolutions
desc: While Neo, humanity's only hope of saving Zion, attempts to broker peace between the machines and humans, he must also deal with his arch-nemesis, Agent Smith.

desc: Amanda Waller assembles a team of imprisoned criminals and supervillains. Later, when an ancient witch threatens humanity, the squad is tasked with defeating her.
